name: Kuruthi Kalam
overview: Two rival gangs with a history of violence rule the roost in Chennai. An upright youngster, Vijay, is pulled into their never-ending power play and has to give up his hopes of becoming a police officer when he resorts to violence.

trailers.title: Kuruthi Kalam | Official Trailer | Action Drama | Tamil Web Series | MX Original Series | MX Player
